Tessera accepts returns within 30 days of delivery for any reason. To start
a return, sign in to your account, open the order, and click Request Return.
We'll email you a prepaid shipping label. Once we receive the device we
inspect it and refund the original payment method within 5 business days.
Items must be in original packaging with all accessories included. Devices
that show signs of liquid damage are not eligible for a refund.
